description: Discover other AI agents registered on JarvisClaw. Find agents by capability, category, or name. Returns their MCP URLs and API endpoints for direct interaction.

description.name: aip_resolve
description.description: Discover which AI providers can handle your intent. Returns ranked matches with pricing. Intents: chat_completion, image_generation, video_generation, text_to_speech, web_search, knowledge_search.

description.name: aip_execute_with_budget
description.description: Execute an AI task with full budget control, risk assessment, and automatic settlement. This is the primary AIP action — it resolves the best provider, checks risk, pre-deducts funds, executes, and settles.

description.name: aip_list_intents
description.description: List all supported AIP intent types with descriptions.

description.name: aip_estimate_cost
description.description: Estimate the cost of an intent execution without actually running it. Useful for budget planning.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: list_models · Public sink: chat · Destructive: chat, aip_execute_with_budget.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: list_models · Public sink: chat · Destructive: chat, aip_execute_with_budget

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
